title: sphaeralcea digitata
intro: Sphaeralcea digitata, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea digitata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal supplements and skincare products due to its soothing and protective properties.
